title: MIXX Style Baby Supersoft Bubble Honeycomb Blanket Boy Girl Cream White Cot Blanket Comforter Wrap WHITE WAFFLE 19C184
features: Baby Supersoft Bubble Blanket Boy Girl White Cream Cot Blanket Cuddle Wrap
Beautiful, soft, warm and comfortable fleece blanket. An essential part of any children's bedroom.
Available in Bubble or Waffle bee design. Can be used in the cot, pram, bed or anywhere you want. Bubble effect design in 2 colours – white and cream – suitable for a girl or a boy.
With ribbon tags so ideal gift idea. Material: Polyester. Dimensions: 90 x 75 centimetres.
